message:
refactor(tests): use struct initialization with spread syntax for TwoTierConfig

Replace mutable field assignments with struct initialization using
`..Default::default()` syntax for cleaner, more idiomatic Rust code.
This makes test configuration more declarative and easier to read.

Also update .gitignore to exclude claude_*.html exports - these are
session export files from Claude Desktop that should not be committed.

- fast_only_mode_skips_refinement: Use struct literal with spread
- quality_weight_affects_ranking: Initialize fast_dimension and
  quality_dimension in struct literal

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
